title: Sonnathu Sonnathu Lyrics Aranamani Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Sonnadhu sonnadhu nee thaney
sondhamum anenney..
nenachadhu nenachadhu ellamey
nadandhidum nesamthaney..

Kaaththaaga naan aanalaum
un moochil kalandhirupen.
kanavaaga naan aanalum
unakaga kaathirupean.

Sonnadhu sonnadhu nee thaney
sondhamum anenney..
nenachadhu nenachadhu ellamey
nadandhidum nesamthaney..

Aala marathil unjal pottu
aadum podhu kaathaa vandhu
eera idupa killi, thee moottiduva

Paasi pootha kulaththil naanum
pathi kaluthu mungi kuzhikka
muthugu pakkam vandhu
thee moottiduva..

Anbe sayum thannala
aattu mandhai pinnala
manja kaatil naan irukka
nenju koottil nee iruka
kuzha saami sela kooda
un pol sirikiradhey.

Aasa, kodi, en manasil
unna serum, naalum, en kanavil
koyil vaasal kolam enna
veetu kolam aakkuna
oorukana deepam enna
nenjukulla eathuna.

Un nenapu intha usiril
ini oru naalum pogadhu
nee kedacha athu pothum
vera varam ingu yedhu.

enaku enna aacho..
unaku enna aacho..
kaadhal namakkul vandhacho..

Sonnadhu sonnadhu nee thaney
sondhamum anenney..
nenachadhu nenachadhu ellamey
nadandhidum nesamthaney..

Kaaththaaga naan aanalaum
un moochil kalandhirupen.
kanavaaga naan aanalum
unakaga kaathirupean.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Sonnathu Sonnathu'?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, expressing the feelings of being intertwined with a loved one.

How does 'Sonnathu Sonnathu' fit into the plot of Aranmanai?

This song captures a romantic moment between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Harini and composed by Bharadwaj.

When was 'Sonnathu Sonnathu' released?

The song was released on September 5, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sonnathu Sonnathu, the protagonist expresses profound feelings of love and connection, beautifully captured through Harini's soothing vocals. The song plays a pivotal role in Aranmanai, enhancing the romantic atmosphere and showcasing the emotional bond between the characters. With its melodic composition by Bharadwaj, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This track is perfect for moments of reflection and celebration of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sonnathu Sonnathu from the movie Aranmanai is a captivating romantic melody that beautifully showcases Harini's enchanting vocals. With Bharadwaj's masterful composition, this song resonates with heartfelt emotions and a soothing vibe. Dive into the world of love and longing with this mesmerizing track that will surely tug at your heartstrings.
stanzaMeanings: You are the only one who speaks, and everything I think happens because of love.
Even if I am a stranger, I blend with your breath. Even if I am a dream, I wait for you.
What happened to me? What happened to you? Has love come to us?
You are the only one who speaks, and everything I think happens because of love.
When the swing is placed on the tree, the love comes and the parrot will burn.
In the blooming flower garden, I will come and burn near the pearl.
My beloved, with your love, I will be in the heart of the dance, while you are in the heart of the crowd, smiling like you.
Desire, the flag, will enter my mind, and every day, the temple door in my dreams will become the light of my home.
Your memory will never leave this life; if you leave, that is enough, nothing else is needed here.
What happened to me? What happened to you? Has love come to us?
You are the only one who speaks, and everything I think happens because of love.
Even if I am a stranger, I blend with your breath. Even if I am a dream, I wait for you.
What happened to me? What happened to you? Has love come to us?
